headline: Axon Extends Win Streak On Target Hike, World Cup Drone Defense
summary: Axon Enterprise — the maker of Tasers, body cameras and software for law enforcement — continued its resurgence on the stock market Monday.  Needham hiked its Axon stock price target to 750 from 600, keeping a buy rating, according to The Fly investment news site.  Axon Enterprise cited an expansion of the Los Angeles Police Department pact with Axon, which will more than double annual spending to $22 million.
